description: We extend the computational test to all 2,000 odd primes up to 17,389 with no exceptions. The BFS orbit computation found exactly 2 orbits, as claimed (the zero vector and all non-zero vectors), for each of the 2,000 primes tested. This gives empirical evidence with zero failures for all 2,000 tested primes (including all those < 17,389).
action_taken: We extend the computational test to all 2,000 odd primes up to 17,389 with no exceptions.
